programme.title: Movie: Santa's Boots

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: When You Die
programme.desc: What really happens when we die? For thousands of years, the dreams and visions of the dying have captivated cultures. But what are they and what causes them? And are they real?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: A forensic scientist makes history when he uses material from a dentist's office to solve a 10-year-old crime involving an elderly couple that was brutally murdered during a robbery.

programme.title: The Dead Wives Club: Vendetta
programme.desc: Sara Raras was a 35-year-old statistician who used her brilliant mind to calculate risk for a living at the National Security Agency. But this new mother could never have predicted the events that led to her haunting murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage

programme.title: Moonshiners: Risky Whiskey
programme.desc: Josh and Bill rebuild bigger and better. Lance takes a risk on a new kind of whiskey, while Jeff and Mark prep their indoor still site. Tickle and crew battle the elements in Kentucky. Tim gives the North Carolina distillery a backwoods makeover.

programme.title: Moonshiners: The Trouble with Tickle
programme.desc: Tickle returns to Tim's legal distillery and discovers he's traded one prison for another. Mark and Digger unearth a trove of Popcorn's shine. Josh finds an untapped market at a biker rally, only to learn the cost of entry is more than the ticket price.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle Runs Again
programme.desc: Moonshine's prodigal son, Tickle, returns from a year in jail to the Appalachian backwoods. With long-time partner, Tim, determined to stay legal, Tickle recruits an old friend to make an inaugural run of shine and re-stake his claim as an outlaw shiner.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Tickle in a Pickle
programme.desc: With Extra Shine bonus scenes: Tickle returns to the world of outlaw shine, Mark and Digger rediscover Popcorn's mystery multi-grain shine and Mike hires a new partner.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Corn-fed Conundrum
programme.desc: With Extra Shine bonus scenes: Tickle helps Tim rediscover his roots as an outlaw while Mark and Digger contend with an unruly herd of cattle. Later, Mike and Jerry make a plan to gain access to a hidden site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tim's Temptation
programme.desc: Tim and Tickle return to the scene of past crimes. Mark and Digger scramble to rescue a legacy mash from escaped livestock. Mark and Huck build a double proofing still.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: No Guts, No Glory Holes
programme.desc: Fred and his crew return to the glory hole to complete unfinished business. Dustin's crew strikes gold, but are blocked by massive boulders and must engineer an insane system of winches and pulleys to go deeper and get down to bedrock.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tim's Temptation
programme.desc: Tim and Tickle return to the scene of past crimes. Mark and Digger scramble to rescue a legacy mash from escaped livestock. Mark and Huck build a double proofing still.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: The Pound Zone
programme.desc: Dustin's crew finds an ideal claim to mine, but to get down to the gold they have to make it through the waterfall's pound zone. Fred brings in a new miner, only to have his path to bedrock gold is blocked by massive boulders.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Mark and Digger: Legends and Legacy
programme.desc: Mark and Digger celebrate their greatest hits and misses. Trace the paths that set these two legends on a crash course with destiny and one another.

programme.title: Inside the FBI
programme.desc: Agents from the San Diego FBI office share details of ongoing cases including a Mexican Mafia takedown and a drug cartel mass murder.

programme.title: America's Most Secret: Structures
programme.desc: Explore some of America's most secret locations and what lies behind the walls.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Mayan Treasure
programme.desc: An explorer searching for treasure at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by a mysterious underwater fog. Thousands of fish spontaneously jump to their deaths. Something alien appears over the skies of Lost Angeles.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Ice Monster
programme.desc: A giant creature in an armor of ice is spotted in the Alaskan wild, and some suspect it's a deadly mythical monster. A jet has a close encounter with an unknown object. Evidence of a deadly lightning strike invites paranormal explanations.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Wrath of Thor
programme.desc: When a ghostly figure is caught on tape stalking people in Japan, some fear its hard evidence of a horrifying local legend.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bull by the Horns
programme.desc: The Wolfpack's quest for complete freedom takes a big step forward with livestock, including a risky 2000lb longhorn bull. Noah and his new wife Rhain Alisha arrive to start making their new life on the mountain with a monumental announcement.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A One Track Mind
programme.desc: Sarah, an RN, has come to the salon with her heart set on one particular lace dress. Kelly is certain she wants a particular ball gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Same Dress, Different Girl
programme.desc: Bride Kasey has OCD, which can be debilitating for her decision-making. Angela arrives in alterations with second thoughts.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Facilitators
programme.desc: Tamika has come to the salon accompanied by her wedding planner, her stylist, and family members.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: For the Love of Mom
programme.desc: Candice is shopping with her mom for her wedding that's just 21 days away. Tabitha has made salon history by spending $70,000.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Big Entourage, Bigger Opinions
programme.desc: Three brides are forced to battle against big opinions in order to score the dress of their dreams.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: Daddy's girl, Katie, comes to the salon hoping to find the perfect mermaid style dress.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Mom's Gonna Find Out
programme.desc: Barry and Kim leave the farm for a night to celebrate their anniversary, putting Micah and Lydia in charge. They just have one rule: Ethan and Olivia aren't allowed to visit the farm while they're away. The Plath kids party and some uninvited guests join.

programme.desc: The Busbys plan a very special Thanksgiving, but bad news for Mimi may throw the holiday into turmoil. When Adam and Danielle find out that Riley and Parker are moving up to a different classroom, Adam struggles with the idea of separating the quints.

programme.title: Counting On: Marriage Bootcamp
programme.desc: Jinger and Jeremy decide to hold a yard sale before their big move to L.A. They must put their haggling skills to work and try to sell as much as they can. Meanwhile, the married couples attend a marriage retreat where they focus on their relationships.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: No Strings Attached
programme.desc: After the request for Isaac to join the band is denied by Barry and Kim, the family divide grows. Kim and Barry try to do damage control by extending a large and surprising olive branch to Ethan and Olivia. Moriah shares her desire for college.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Courtney Cox
programme.desc: Courteney Cox traces her maternal line back to ambitious and ruthless relatives who plotted and murdered their way to power in medieval times; and she's shocked to discover an ancestor who's one of European history's most famous characters.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Jennifer Grey
programme.desc: Jennifer Grey discovers much more about the grandfather she thought she knew as she uncovers how he survived adversity to become a beacon of his community, and discovers a great-grandmother whose devastating tragedy stopped her from making it to America.

programme.title: Hodges Half Dozen: Adventures in Toddler Potty Training
programme.desc: Liz and Daniel try to potty train Rowan while keeping up with the needs of the quints. Daniel's brothers surprise Liz and Rowan with a playground for their backyard. As Connell struggles to gain weight, Liz and Daniel worry he may require a risky surgery.

programme.title: Hodges Half Dozen: The Quints' First Halloween
programme.desc: The Hodges get ready for their first Halloween with their half dozen kids, including matching costumes for the quints. Later, Liz and Daniel are shocked to learn that Nolan, Connell, Liam and Dillon have medical conditions that may require surgeries.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Victoria
programme.desc: Victoria's boyfriend moves in on a trial basis to see if he can handle her jarring and flush free lifestyle.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Stephanie/ Larry
programme.desc: Stephanie's cheap behaviour embarrasses her boyfriend, Patrick, who thinks they have plenty of money to spend.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Merry Cheapskate Christmas
programme.desc: Sarah visits junkyards for her family's Christmas gifts. Shelley creates a Christmas 'turkey' out of ground meat, chicken and turkey legs.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Knock, Knock, It's Theresa!
programme.desc: Theresa surprises people with readings set up by their friends and family. From a salon to a doughnut shop to pretending to be a substitute babysitter, Theresa is showing up in the most unlikely places to deliver healing.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Guess Who?
programme.desc: It's an all-surprise, all-Knock and Shock special! Theresa surprises unsuspecting people at a hotel and a dentist's office. Later Theresa surprises the kidney donor who saved her friend's life after seeing the show last year.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Campstove Stuffing
programme.desc: A new doctor must stand up to a superior who wants to send his wife into surgery with undiagnosed rectal bleeding. A man comes into the ER with a surprising body part stuck inside a camping stove. A six-year-old boy has a rare massive stroke.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Drunk and Drunker
programme.desc: A martial arts instructor suffers abdominal pains that quickly turn into a deadly diagnosis; when teenage victims of a car crash fill his small ER, a doctor must make critical decisions.

programme.title: Gypsy Sisters: It's Been One Long, Hot Summer
programme.desc: As the summer ends, the ladies settle into their new beginnings. Kayla organizes a luau bash for the clan, Mellie plans a baptism for baby Richard; Sheena and Annie mend their marriages. Later at the luau, Mellie lashes out at JoAnn, who fights back.

programme.title: Gypsy Sisters: A Family on Thin Ice
programme.desc: After months of reconciliation, Kayla and Nettie find themselves at odds. Kayla throws Sissy and Richard a belly dancing themed birthday party.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Infiniti and Dave
programme.desc: 19-year-old dancer Infiniti wants Nev and Max to help her find out if her online love is real. What the pair uncover is far shadier than either of them had ever imagined.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Larissa and Anthony
programme.desc: After being catfished by her high school best friend, Larissa turn to her online friend Anthony for support. Feelings between them grew to love, but after a few false moves on Anthony's part, Larissa is worried he too is lying.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lauren and Derek
programme.desc: Lauren met Derek on MySpace years ago, yet they've never met in real life. Derek is caring, supporting Lauren after she had a baby with a former boyfriend.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Andrew and Zac

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Bear
programme.desc: Kailyn and her boys say goodbye to the family dog. Jade takes Sean in with surprising results. Briana confronts John about their deteriorating relationship. Chelsea gets a shocking request from Adam's mom. Leah is reminded of her past with Jeremy.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young and Pregnant: Unconvenient

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Dr. Drew Pinsky

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lil Yachty

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXV

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sam Sadler
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined all the way from the UK by YouTube's Sam Sadler to rock out to some 'pins and needles' and get 'scared forever.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXXIX

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Vitaly Zdorovetskiy
programme.desc: Youtube Prankster Vitaly Zdorovetskiy joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to meet some natural born pranksters, travel to the broviet union and learn a few swole shortcuts.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: JWoww Gets Her Groove Back
programme.desc: Vinny loses his footing, the boys visit Mike in jail, and JWoww has a new man.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Gym, Tan, Strip

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Tick. Tick. Tick.
programme.desc: Angelina gets herself in a slippery situation, the roomies get a call from Mike, and Ronnie's relationship isn't as good as it seems.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Strippendales
programme.desc: Jenni gets involved with Ronnie's relationship, Vinny bares it all on the Chippendales stage, and Pauly pulls the ultimate prank: cue Uncle Nino.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: A Very Jersey Friendsgiving

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Ghost Boy
programme.desc: Beast Boy pretends to be a ghost haunting Starfire so she will do his bidding. When she figures out the ruse, she and the other Titans convince Beast Boy that he’s actually dead.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Hey Pizza!
programme.desc: Robin struggles with whether to build a senior center or a pool, while Beast Boy and Cyborg try to get a pizza for free.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Gorilla
programme.desc: Beast Boy turns into a loud, obnoxious gorilla and refuses to change back, driving Robin crazy. Gorilla Beast Boy takes over the leadership of the Titans, which leads to chaos.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: You're Fired
programme.desc: Beast Boy's poor job performance leads to his being fired from the Titans. After auditioning possible replacements, a pair of shape-shifting twins is hired.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Starliar/ Terra-ized
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Burger vs. Burrito/ Matched
programme.desc: Cyborg and Beast Boy compete to figure out whether burgers or burritos are better; Cyborg's Love Matcher 5000 program pairs Raven with Beast Boy and Starfire with Aquaman.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Lazy Sunday
programme.desc: Cyborg and Beast Boy love lazy Sundays sitting on the couch ... even when it's a Tuesday! But when Robin replaces the couch with a treadmill, the two lazy teens must embrace the new active lifestyle.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Power Moves
programme.desc: Robin gets carried away when he and Cyborg start merging their powers and technology into cool Power Moves. He even moves into Cyborg's body and refuses to leave.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Staring at the Future
programme.desc: Cyborg and Beast Boy have a staring contest that lasts 30 years, bringing them face to face with a future of adulthood and responsibility ... and they hate it.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Caged Tiger
programme.desc: After their 'bro-cation,' Cyborg, Beast Boy and Robin return closer than ever but their bro-mentum is interrupted by Dr. Light. Teen Titans Bro!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Waffles
programme.desc: Cyborg and Beast Boy show their love of waffles by making it the only word they say, much to the annoyance of the other Titans. Maybe Brother Blood can make them stop, with the help of his new henchman, Pain Bot.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Be Mine
programme.desc: Tara accepts Beast Boy's invitation to the Valentine's Day dance to exact her revenge.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Brain Food
programme.desc: Tired of being the least intelligent of the Titans, Beast Boy uses Raven’s spell book to cast a spell — not to make himself smarter, but to make all of the other Titans dumber.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Missing
programme.desc: Cyborg, Beast Boy and Robin return Silkie to Killer Moth to collect a cash reward. Starfire is devastated until she sees Killer Moth might love Silkie just as much as she does.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Uncle Jokes
programme.desc: Hoping to learn how to be actually funny - unlike Robin who can only tell 'uncle jokes' - Starfire asks to join Cyborg and Beast Boy's twosome.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Man Person
programme.desc: Beast Boy is distressed by his big new battle scar, until Cyborg convinces him that the scar makes him look tough and manly. Now Beast Boy wants to look even tougher.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sharpe Shooters

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Making Cents

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Comic Con
programme.desc: Chumlee and Corey take a look at some sketches drawn by Spider-Man creator Stan Lee. Check out a Japanese machine gun camera.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Captain Rick

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Spacing Out

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Old Man Corey
programme.desc: A 1966 Harley Davidson rides into the shop. Find out if Corey risks it all to cruise away with this chopper or if he suffers a major blowout. Then, Rick flashes back to the '60s when a collection of NBC promotional posters unroll in the shop.

programme.desc: Handprints signed by Sylvester Stallone come into the shop. Then, Rick scouts out two signed Norman Rockwell lithographs. Later, Chumlee tries to prove he is more active than everyone thinks he is by entering an arm-wrestling competition.

programme.desc: A top hat and pistol said to have once belonged to a Jack the Ripper suspect have Rick greatly intrigued. Corey is set on obtaining a 1920s time clock. Rick and Chum must decide on the purchase of a slew of celebrity signatures and the rights to a game.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn of the Seas

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of America's Wonders
programme.desc: New discoveries at America's greatest monuments are revealing their long-lost secrets, and using cutting-edge technology and the latest archaeology, experts find ground-breaking evidence that challenge everything we know about these mysterious places.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Cutting-edge technology is revealing new evidence into the whereabouts of the Holy Grail, and using the latest archaeological methods, investigators are turning up shocking discoveries that could reveal some of the darkest secrets of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
Unearthed: Mount Rushmore: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Delving into the dark secrets behind one of the most iconic landmarks in America: Mount Rushmore. Scientists reveal the secret history of its creation, and what lies behind the rock.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for the Holy Grail

programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile
programme.desc: Cataclysmic changes in ancient Egypt might have been caused by an extraordinary set of international phenomena, and the latest tech helps identify the supernatural culprit. What experts discover reveals a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Lost City of the Sun Cult
programme.desc: When experts unearth a mysterious lost city built by an infamous pharaoh, they find clues of a grisly catastrophe. New discoveries reveal the apocalyptic events that turned this place into hell on earth, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Oil Rig vs. Sinkhole
programme.desc: When an oil rig in a Louisiana lake drills in the wrong place, it causes a massive whirlpool that drains the entire lake; experts investigate why this sinkhole disaster was one of the greatest engineering catastrophes in American history.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Boston's Big Dig Disaster
programme.desc: Boston's Big Dig was one of the most ambitious engineering projects in history, but in 2006, a fatal collapse in one of its tunnels put the ambitious project in doubt; experts reveal what caused this engineering disaster and how it was fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare on Main Street
programme.desc: A railroad bridge on the edge of disaster, a nightmare in a fairy-tale town, and a massive cathedral in calamity are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Chicago's Tower of Terror
programme.desc: When the innovative design of an iconic Chicago skyscraper leads to tragedy, experts must apply cutting-edge tech and the latest engineering methods to fix an urgent, life-or-death problem.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: NASA Under Pressure
programme.desc: When catastrophe strikes Skylab, life on earth is threatened by a space station cratering toward earth, and NASA experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong and if disaster can be averted.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare in Florida
programme.desc: When a brand-new bridge suddenly collapses in Miami, several die in a horrifying calamity. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how an innovative bridge-building technique could be to blame.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: The Towering Inferno
programme.desc: A skyscraper causing hellish heat in downtown Dallas, a swarm of sinkholes, and a landmark with a fatal secret.

programme.title: Casanova Killers: Lethal Lovers

programme.desc: In 1990, a teenage boy vanishes. Nearly two decades later, there's still no trace of him, dead or alive. It's a mother's worst nightmare, but one detective refuses to stop looking until he's able to solve this mystery.

programme.title: Shattered: One Wrong Turn
programme.desc: In 2005, in a small Florida town, a doting grandmother interrupts the murder of her grandson. As the investigation into it launches, it's revealed that the witnesses know more than they are letting on.

programme.title: Shattered: The Bodies Out Back
programme.desc: 1986. A 13-year-old girl escapes her captors, then lives in fear they'll return to kill her. A young boy learns his father's fate and realizes his nightmares are memories, and a prison break leads a rookie cop on the hunt for two ruthless murderers.

programme.title: Shattered: End of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1986, Geri Muck searches desperately for her missing daughter, but she has no idea that she's too late. The prosecutor wants justice, the brother wants revenge, but Geri just wants her daughter back.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Beauty for Ashes
programme.desc: In 2016, 33-year-old Tricia Todd was reported missing after failing to pick up her daughter from a babysitter. As her family hoped and prayed, investigators found her online journal that revealed the true horror of what had happened.

programme.title: What Happened to Bo Kirk?
programme.desc: When methodical and consummate family man Bo Kirk makes uncharacteristic withdrawals from a shared checking account and fails to turn up for a family dinner, his wife is certain something has gone horribly wrong.

programme.title: Truth About Murder With Sunny Hostin: Murder at the Window
programme.desc: A new job in a new town seems like a promising start for expectant parents Kent and Malinda Gibbons. But life quickly turns into a nightmare when Kent finds Malinda raped and murdered at home. Detectives find themselves in a race to stop a killer.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Exposed
programme.desc: Three young girls meet a new friend online. Like other boys in the chat rooms, he's around their age, friendly, and flirtatious. Months later his demeanor shifts, trapping the girls in a vicious game from which they can't escape.

programme.title: What Happened to Bo Kirk?

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Beauty for Ashes
programme.desc: In 2016, 33-year-old Tricia Todd was reported missing after failing to pick up her daughter from a babysitter. As her family hoped and prayed, investigators found her online journal that revealed the true horror of what had happened.

programme.title: See No Evil: A Date with Dalene
programme.desc: On August 6th 2011, Dalene Carlson vanishes during a Saturday night on the town. Security footage from a local bar reveals a number of potential suspects, each with a motive.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: A father-to-be is shot while out for a morning walk, leaving his wife a widow. Security footage from the scene reveals his final, shocking moments.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Master Manipulator
programme.desc: When Brian Cargill divorced his wife, Kimberly, he thought it was the end of the worst time of his life. Instead, he found himself in a desperate battle to save his son, Jamie, from her deadly wrath.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Cheating Death
programme.desc: Cathy thought she had found the man of her dreams in Peter Tobin. But by the time she discovered his dark secret, it was too late. How would she keep herself and her son alive long enough to escape one of the most evil men in modern history?

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Invited Him In
programme.desc: Jill Garrison thought her second go-around with love would be the one that lasted the rest of her life. But then her quiet town suddenly began to be preyed upon by a nightmarish killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Knew What He Was
programme.desc: Ronald and Patty had always seen the signs that their older brother, Bernard Eugene Giles, had a darker side. When Gene finally lets loose the monster lurking inside, they couldn't help but wonder how things had gone so wrong.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Hate Being Daddy's Girl
programme.desc: When Robin Doll was rescued from her mother's violence and went to live with her father, she thought she had cheated death. She had no way of knowing that the man she looked to as her savior was hiding something even worse.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Cop and the Killer
programme.desc: When Walt Chavis joined the police force, he was prepared to risk his life, but he never imagined the greatest threat he would face would be his own brother or that one day he would be forced to choose between his duty and his family.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Twisted Sister
programme.desc: When Elizabeth Flores was a child, her sister, Louise, tried to shield her from a horrible family secret. But when Louise met David Turpin, that all changed. The girl who ran from monsters became one herself.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Butcher of Buffalo
programme.desc: Mother of three Joan Giambra is discovered strangled, lying naked under her comatose 11-year old daughter. The young girl becomes the only hope of catching a serial killer.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Blood In The Water
programme.desc: When a bag containing body parts washes up on the shore of the lake, the search for missing 10-year old Holly Jones becomes a grisly murder investigation. Police must race to find the perpetrator of this shocking crime before another child is murdered.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Alley of Death
programme.desc: When 14-year old Gloria Pointer is found raped and murdered in an alleyway, it is the start of a thirty-year quest for answers by her mother who will not give up until she finds justice for her daughter.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War II
programme.desc: By the end of the 70's, war between East and West has been raging for decades. Countless proxy wars have proven how destructive the Cold War can be. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Warmonger
programme.desc: In the early 1980's, the next battlefield in the struggle between communism and democracy emerges, and it's in the United State's own backyard.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Weaponology: Spetsnaz
programme.desc: Spetsnaz are Russia's elite fighting force. From counter terrorist strike squads to special operations experts spearheading the Red Army, these ultimate warriors strike hard and fast.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.desc: Gathered from the four corners of the globe, Legionnaires leave their past behind to fight for the glory of France.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Warmonger
programme.desc: In the early 1980's, the next battlefield in the struggle between communism and democracy emerges, and it's in the United State's own backyard.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Zoot Suit Riots
programme.desc: In pre-war America street gangs were on the rise. California media stirred up panic about young Mexicans and Latinos. When WWII began, racial tensions increased and they were quickly portrayed as a significant threat, leading to a racial boiling point.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Godfather of London
programme.desc: Billy Hill was the most powerful Kingpin in Britain's post-war underworld, but the secret behind Hill's empire is little known.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Demon Doctor
programme.desc: Known for his dubious medical practices and shady financial deals, the Nazi occupation liberated Dr. Marcel Petio's murderous instincts, enabling him to embark on a shocking killing spree.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Israel
programme.desc: Travel to the Middle East to uncover the very latest weapons being designed for the Israel Defence Forces.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Close Protection
programme.desc: A look at a top secret device that stops terrorists from smuggling weapons onto planes, the newest multi-caliber combat weapon, the latest naval gun and one of the deadliest close quarter weapons.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Guns
programme.desc: A rapid-fire cannon that's becoming a hit with the US military; the personal defence weapon that has the same knockdown as bigger guns, the Gatling gun that rains fire on target and the new multi-calibre assault weapon.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Future Warrior
programme.desc: An assault riffle that can be converted into a sniper riffle is examined.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hometown Heroes
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the guys sit down to talk about a few of their favourite things: cabins and barns. With special guests, never-before-seen footage and hilarious outtakes, the builders are having fun. Mark also talks about his new house.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Salvaging Pristine Hand-Hewn Logs from a West Virginia Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys travel to the heart of West Virginia, to salvage incredibly rare 170-year-old logs from a perfectly preserved log home. The pressure is on to keep these logs pristine as they take them down.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rebuilding the 100% Cabin and Restoring a Legacy
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take the 100% cabin to South Carolina where they rebuild it as a hunting cabin. While they are there, they work with the client's kids to build a camping cabin out of their ancestor's log home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Victory Lap
programme.desc: Mark Bowe returns to the finished homes of some of his favourite 'Barnwood Builders' jobs. After months of work, the 100% cabin, Rose's cabin, the Boy Scout cabin and many more are living new lives as modern homes.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Edge of Maine
programme.desc: A creative family builds a three-story tiny house full of clever features in the easternmost property in the U.S. But with limited experience and a tight deadline, they'll need the help of a few locals to get it done. Follow their journey now.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountaintop
programme.desc: A couple builds their off-grid dream home on a remote mountaintop overlooking the Southwest Montana backcountry. Together they've dreamed up a mountain base camp that's high tech and suits their outdoor lifestyle.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: High Altitude Hideout
programme.desc: Adventure seeker Joey Caiafa sets out to build a mountaintop hideout outside of Leadville, Colorado. He enlists the help of his friends and an architectural designer to trick out the solar-powered space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountaintop
programme.desc: A couple builds their off-grid dream home on a remote mountaintop overlooking the Southwest Montana backcountry. Together they've dreamed up a mountain base camp that's high tech and suits their outdoor lifestyle.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: High Altitude Hideout
programme.desc: Adventure seeker Joey Caiafa sets out to build a mountaintop hideout outside of Leadville, Colorado. He enlists the help of his friends and an architectural designer to trick out the solar-powered space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Edge of Maine
programme.desc: A creative family builds a three-story tiny house full of clever features in the easternmost property in the U.S. But with limited experience and a tight deadline, they'll need the help of a few locals to get it done. Follow their journey now.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Docked Out: Paddleboard Dock: Sun and Surf Water Sports Oasis
programme.desc: The crew builds a sun-and-surf themed dock for a family of three. It features a boat slip, solar panels, a swim step for each water access, and areas for both sun and shade. It also includes a custom paddleboard-inspired bench.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: American Rehab: Charleston: Country Victorian Porch
programme.desc: Trent's next project is just outside the city in the small town of Summerville. It's a 107-year-old country Victorian home that has fallen into disrepair over the years.

programme.title: American Rehab: Charleston: Historic Living Foom and Foyer
programme.desc: Trent is careful to save as much of the original house as possible as he begins demolition in the living room and foyer. As soon as demo begins, he realizes termite damage and wood rot have destroyed nearly every surface.

programme.title: American Rehab: Charleston: Octagon Breakfast Nook, Sun Porch and Side Porch
programme.desc: Trent Fasnacht restores the octagon room and sun room, and he creates a new side porch in this phase of the restoration of his 1906 country Victorian just outside Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: American Rehab: Charleston: Historic Kitchen Remodel
programme.desc: Trent rebuilds the kitchen in its original spot at the front of his 1906 country Victorian in Summerville, South Carolina. His design plan calls for custom bead board cabinets, a glass tile backsplash and authentic butcher block countertops.

programme.title: American Rehab: Charleston: Cozy Office and Guest Bedroom With Built-Ins
programme.desc: Licensed Contractor Trent Fasnacht is about half way finished rehabbing his 1906 country Victorian. He is demolishing the home's dated bathroom, and pulling down walls in an office and bedroom.

programme.title: American Rehab: Charleston: Historic Master Suite With Southern Charm
programme.desc: Trent Fasnacht finishes the restoration of his 1906 country Victorian by turning the old 1960s kitchen and dining room addition into a beautiful master suite. Once finished, it exudes coastal calm, with elements of the past repurposed for modern use.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Looking Out for Lava Tubes in Kona
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are on the hunt to find an empty lot with great ocean views. They want to build a spec home on the property that they can turn around and sell in the coming year.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Skylight to the Stars and a Stunning Free-Form Lanai
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler build a brand new house in an upcountry area of the Big Island. Skylights are placed throughout the home, including a giant one in the master bedroom that will allow the homeowners to sleep under the stars.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: A Pool With An Ocean View
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler fly to Maui to get inspiration for renovating a vacation rental property back on the Big Island.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Ocean View Open House
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are ready to sell the first house they ever built in Hawaii, but the Ocean View house needs some freshening up first, including replacing a rotted-out back lanai.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Lava Stamp of Approval
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler create a custom lava-stamp driveway and front lanai that add major curb appeal to a spec home in the Palisades area of Kona.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Refreshing Pool Renovation
programme.desc: The Dickinsons revitalize an algae-filled pool. Diandra finds the perfect glass tile to replace the outdated ceramic waterline tiles, while Tyler fixes the cracked pool deck and builds a stained Douglas fir fence around it.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Flipping a 1970s Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler flip a 1970s fixer-upper to get it ready for a broker's open. They focus on maximizing the ocean views by designing a new floor plan for the kitchen, and adding a thin cable railing on the lanai to open up the view.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Cashing in on Curb Appeal
programme.desc: The Dickinsons' strategy to attract potential buyers to a spec home with the curb appeal of a lava stamp driveway has paid off. A realtor has clients who already want to look at the house, but there's still so much work left to do.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flip School
programme.desc: Two friends flip a home together. One wants the renovation done as soon as possible, while the other moves from one project to another.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Her Way or the Highway
programme.desc: Monica has worked on her own home and believes that she knows everything about construction. Whit thinks she might be making things more difficult than they need to be, but what Monica wants, Monica gets.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Hit the Breaks
programme.desc: Ernie and Megan are school teachers who have decided to flip a house during their summer vacation. While Megan wants to make this house the best it can possibly be, Ernie just wants to finish the flip and hopefully put some money in their pockets.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: High Heels and High Budget
programme.desc: A husband and wife flipping team have found the bargain of a lifetime in one of the country's most expensive zip codes: the Hamptons. They soon find the amazing location may not be worth all the issues they discover in this run-down home.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lone Star Load-Up
programme.desc: Roger is loading up on the best brisket, pork steaks and sausages the Lone Star state has to offer. Ronnie's BBQ in Johnson City attracts locals and barbecue aficionados.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: All You Can Feast
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes to Llano Seco Ranch in Chico, Calif., where he and Charlie Thieriot slow roast a 30-pound porchetta. In Sandy, Ore., Rogers meets caterers Jaret Foster and Mona Johnson and assists in roasting mussels.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Women Fire Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking salutes the country's most impressive and creative female pitmasters, learning a few new roasting methods along the way.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire Festivals
programme.desc: Join the party as Roger Mooking visits three of the greatest fire-roasted ragers that cook mountains of meat and keep the barbecue faithful lining up for more. He attends a church picnic with nearly four tons of meat and a crowd of 4,000 carnivores.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meaty Marvels
programme.desc: In Palatine, IL, Greg and Kristina create Brazilian-style barbecue at Rockin Rodizio.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ and Boils in the Bayou
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Louisiana bayou for barbecue, brunch and a crawfish boil. In Prairieville, L.A., he helps a husband-and-wife team of caterers prepare baby back ribs, brisket and 200 pounds of live crawfish.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Local Legends
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 15 of America's best dishes that have achieved local legend status. From sentimental favorites like deep-dish pizza, patty melts and spaghetti and meatballs to an old-fashioned clambake and lobster roll.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Smokey
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, where a place he went as a kid combines several classic sweets to make a one-of-a-kind dessert burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Build Your Own Burger
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon starts at the ultimate custom burger bar in Providence, Rhode Island, where he chooses from over 400,000 topping combinations to create his own meaty masterpiece.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Giant Meat and Habanero Heat
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with a burger that originated as a late night, off-menu secret and accidentally became the talk of the town. Then, in Seattle, a beer hall serves a mammoth, pretzel-breaded, deep-fried pork shank.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Burnt Ends For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Plainview, N.Y., where a chocolate bacon burger is loaded from top to bottom with sweet and savory indulgence. A restaurant in Columbus, Ohio, has a soy-marinated pineapple hanger steak draped over spicy kimchi fried rice.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Francisco
programme.desc: Adam devours a Mission Style Super Burrito, ginormous sandwiches, and a two-gallon monster sundae.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Nashville, TN
programme.desc: Casey's mouthwatering mission brings him to Tennessee, where he faces his hottest challenge yet: three jumbo chicken tenders smothered in a Carolina Reaper-infused sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Milwaukee, WI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Milwaukee for some epic Brew City eats, including a pitcher-sized Bloody Mary garnished with a whole chicken and a four-and-a-half-pound Reuben sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Thanksgiving!

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Girls' Night

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Grillin' Out With Dad

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Spicy L.A.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Not Fond of Fondant
programme.desc: Soon-to-be-married Josh and Jessalyn have planned everything for their French-themed wedding, with one big exception. They haven't been able to agree on the perfect cake design to represent them both.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Mint For Each Other
programme.desc: With only two weeks until their wedding, Pat and Alli are looking for the perfect cake that pays tribute to his time in the armed services and plays to her love of classic, rustic elegance.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: No Cakes on Deck
programme.desc: With just a few weeks until Geoff and Brittany's wedding the couple still can't agree on their perfect cake.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Twice as Nice
programme.desc: Delpha and Delerice are throwing a lavish birthday party and are in search of the perfect cake. The sisters don't share similar tastes and bakers take on the twins challenge with hopes to keep both happy.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Rise and Dine
programme.desc: Rise and Dine with Unwrapped 2.0 and find out how the light and airy French donut gets its fancy twist, as well as how sprouted wheat turns into a hearty, tasty cinnamon raisin bagel.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Snack Bar
programme.desc: Alfonso explores some snack bar treats, starting with cool and refreshing Junior Mints and their signature dimple. For dessert on the go, find out about Nemo's carrot cake squares and Tasty Kate's individual cherry pies.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: It's A Rainbow
programme.desc: It's a kaleidoscope of color as Alfonso Ribeiro finds out how RW Garcia make their tortilla chips so vibrantly red. Then it's off to Amy's Kitchen for their multicolored, palate-pleasing Thai Red Curry Bowl.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Simple Goodness
programme.desc: Alfonso covers all things easy from snacks that evoke childhood memories like iconic Hostess Twinkies and the colorful Jel Sert Otter Pops to easy dinner solutions like Bertolli's Chicken Parmigiana and Penne.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy

programme.title: DuckTales: JAW$!
programme.desc: Lena unleashes a magical megalodon in Scrooge's money bin.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: Rendezvous Point
programme.desc: Doza attempts to meet a Resistance pilot from his past. Meanwhile the pilot has been captured by the First Order.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Cloak and Dagger
programme.desc: When a new criminal duo, Cloak and Dagger, emerge at Midtown High with the plan to take revenge against Midtown's benefactor Tiberius Stone and his company Alchemax, Superior Spider-Man must take them down and protect the school.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muira-Horror!

programme.desc: Feeling menaced by tech genius Mark Beaks' newest invention, Launchpad recruits brilliant young scientist Fenton.

programme.title: DuckTales: Day of the Only Child!
programme.desc: Dewey creates a holiday so that triplets can be only children for just one day. Quickly, the brothers learn that they need each other more than they realized.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast? / Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.desc: Seven months after the death of Washington State QB Tyler Hilinski, his parents cope with their grief and memories.

programme.title: Gymratts: Florida Gators Basketball

programme.title: TrueSouth: New Orleans
programme.desc: From Liuzza's and Mandina's – two Sicilian corner stores that have become neighborhood Creole Italian restaurants – look at how and why some stories get erased while others become defining narratives.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Beaumont
programme.desc: Once a Southern institution, barbecue has become an American obsession and Texas brisket has been mainstreamed. This is a story about a scrappy onetime oil boomtown, where cooks make the most of scraps, and about two Gulf Coast dishes that have hung on.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Hodgenville
programme.desc: In the southern towns of Hodgenville and Bardstown, Kentucky, the land where Lincoln was born, conflicting ideas about identity and purpose come into focus. Onion burgers and country sausage prove constants in a time of great change.

programme.desc: A former CIA operative is kidnapped by a group of terrorists. When his son learns there is no plan for his father to be saved, he launches his own rescue operation.

programme.title: Movie: Charlie St. Cloud
programme.desc: Overcome by grief, a young man takes a job as a caretaker at the cemetery where his younger brother is buried.

programme.title: Movie: Barbershop 2: Back in Business
programme.desc: Adventures and laughs ensue as a stylist at the beauty shop next door tries to cut in on Calvin's business. Calvin also faces more struggles to keep his father's shop afloat as urban developers invade the neighbourhood and try to close his business.

programme.title: Movie: Secondhand Lions
programme.desc: A shy young boy is sent to spend the summer with his wealthy, eccentric uncles in Texas.

programme.title: Movie: Ice Age: The Meltdown
programme.desc: Manny, Sid and Diego come to realize that the warm weather could spell trouble by melting a large glacial dam surrounding the valley. Along the way, Manny's fears of being the last woolly mammoth are diminished when he meets a female named Ellie.

programme.title: Movie: Alpha
programme.desc: A young man injured and left for dead during the last ice age struggles to survive in a hostile world. After fighting off a pack of wolves, he nurses one of the injured animals back to health and forms a lasting bond with it that changes history.

programme.title: Movie: Field of Dreams
programme.desc: After hearing voices, a farmer constructs a mystical baseball diamond in his cornfield. To his surprise, deceased members from the Chicago Black Sox come to the field to play baseball.

programme.title: Movie: McFarland, USA
programme.desc: A PE teacher takes a job at a predominantly Latino high school in a small California town, and puts together what becomes a championship cross-country team.

programme.title: Movie: Catch a Christmas Star
programme.desc: When a pop star reunites with her first love, the pressures of the spotlight could threaten their budding romance.

programme.title: Movie: Rocky Mountain Christmas
programme.desc: Sarah Davis finds love in an unusual entitled Hollywood star, who visits her family ranch to prepare for a film.

programme.title: Movie: One Starry Christmas
programme.desc: Holly can't wait to go back to New York City and introduce her big shot boyfriend.

programme.title: Movie: Holiday for Heroes
programme.desc: Worlds suddenly collide for a woman and a soldier who have been exchanging letters for a year finally meet.

programme.title: Movie: Once Upon a Christmas Miracle
programme.desc: A woman falls in love with her liver donor, and his selfless gesture leads to a Christmas miracle for everyone.

programme.title: Movie: A Godwink Christmas
programme.desc: Two people find their paths continuing to cross over the holidays at Martha's Vineyard.

programme.title: Movie: Our Christmas Love Song
programme.desc: A country-singer is accused of plagiarizing her holiday single. Because of this, she is forced to return home to spend the holidays with her family, and an old flame that resurfaces in her life.

programme.title: Movie: A Joyous Christmas
programme.desc: A successful motivational speaker learns the true meaning of Christmas when she is rescued from a near fatal accident by a stranger.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas With Holly
programme.desc: A young girl writes a letter to Santa asking for a mother for Christmas after her mother dies.

programme.title: Movie: Return to Christmas Creek
programme.desc: A young CEO travels back to the inn she grew up at, where she must convince her dad who she stopped talking to 20 years earlier to put aside their difference and experience the true meaning of Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Holiday Hearts
programme.desc: A woman is forced to help care for her friend’s daughter, with the help of a friend. Along the way, the two of them find not only the Christmas spirit, but also, love.

programme.title: Movie: Two Turtle Doves
programme.desc: A doctor returns to her hometown in search of a beloved family heirloom. While visiting, she meets a little girl, and her father, and teaches the two of them what the true meaning of the holidays are.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Note
programme.desc: A woman moves to a new town with her son. In her building she meets her new neighbor and helps her uncover the truth of a sibling she was not aware of, during the course creates a bond and unites a community just in time for Christmas.

programme.desc: The Brooklyn shop is finally open and Ceaser throws a block party to celebrate the grand opening. After Donna gives Alex an ultimatum, things don't go as expected. Crystal has a new jaw and a new attitude. Bae finds out Tati is hiding a big secret.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew: Basic and Predictable
programme.desc: After opening the Brooklyn shop, rumors swirl about the altercation between Crystal and Miss Kitty. Sky struggles with the future of her Miami shop. News that Tati is dating a new man causes issues for Ted. Puma courts Rich for a return to the shop.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew: Fake Slim Shady
programme.desc: The crew heads to Cleveland for the first stop on Walt's comedy tour and to see Donna's hometown, but there are fireworks right off the bat. Alex finally meets Donna's dad and things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew: Lawyer Up!
programme.desc: Walt headlines his first comedy show tour in Cleveland. Kitty threatens to sue Ceaser while Alex tries to win Donna’s dad over.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew: Black Ink Prom
programme.desc: When Sky announces a 'Black Ink' prom, the competition for who will be King and Queen gets fierce. Q works with Crystal to get Ceaser back. One of Donna's tattoo clients sends a threatening letter to the shop.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew: Chicago: Season 6 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Get an exclusive sneak peek at the upcoming season.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew: Black Ink Prom
programme.desc: When Sky announces a 'Black Ink' prom, the competition for who will be King and Queen gets fierce. Q works with Crystal to get Ceaser back. One of Donna's tattoo clients sends a threatening letter to the shop.

programme.title: Movie: Coming to America
programme.desc: An African prince travels to America to avoid an arranged marriage and find a new bride.

programme.title: Movie: Trading Places
programme.desc: A smarmy stockbroker and a down-and-out street hustler find their lives switched on the whim of two powerful brothers; after seeking each other out, they plot a poetic revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A wise-creaking, rule-breaking Detroit cop finds himself in Los Angeles to investigate the murder of a friend. While there, he teaches some stiff-necked Beverly Hills counterparts some lessons in the fine arts of investigation techniques.

programme.title: Movie: Coming to America
programme.desc: An African prince travels to America to avoid an arranged marriage and find a new bride.

programme.title: Movie: Overboard
programme.desc: A snobby heiress suffers from amnesia after falling off her yacht and hitting her head. A carpenter takes advantage of the situation by convincing her that she is his wife and the mother of his unruly brood of children.

programme.title: Movie: Titanic
programme.desc: Two social opposites meet and fall in love while on Titanic's maiden voyage.

programme.title: Movie: Never Been Kissed
programme.desc: A journalist poses as a high school student for her first cover story, where she is forced to relive the hardest time of her life and become popular.

programme.title: Movie: Snow Bride
programme.desc: A reporter pretends to be the girlfriend of the son of a famous politician to help him save face over Christmas. She becomes torn between exposing newsworthy scoops about the famous family and trusting that she's falling in love for real.

programme.title: Movie: Cherished Memories: A Gift to Remember
programme.desc: A couple celebrate their second Christmas together, but, an unexpected guest, and a fight to save their town's community centre, ensures they have a Christmas they have never forget.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Club
programme.desc: Two busy strangers are thrown together to help an elderly woman recover her lost savings. While working together, the magic of the season prevails, leading the couple to discover something they have been missing, love.

programme.title: Movie: A Shoe Addict's Christmas
programme.desc: A self-professed 'Christmas hater' is locked in a department store on Christmas Eve. There, she meets a woman who claims to be her 'guardian angel' and shares with her three Christmas ghosts.

programme.title: Movie: 12 Gifts of Christmas
programme.desc: A woman is hired to become a personal shopper for an uptight, corporate executive. As they work together, she teaches him that Christmas has less to do with the money that is spent, and more to do with the people in your life.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Cookies
programme.desc: A small-town factory, Aunt Sally's Christmas Cookie Company, is sold to large conglomerate. Their executive must seal the deal and shut down the factory, the town's lifeblood, but things become complicated when she meets the new owner.

programme.title: Movie: Enchanted Christmas
programme.desc: An interior designer returns to Utah to spearhead a hotel renovation for the annual Christmas Eve show run by her former boyfriend. When she steps in to dance in the show's finale with him, she is torn between her job, family and feelings.

programme.title: Movie: Check Inn to Christmas
programme.desc: A town's Christmas celebration is used to reunite two families to save an inn.

programme.title: Movie: A Royal Christmas
programme.desc: A woman is whisked away to Europe when her boyfriend reveals he's actually a prince.

programme.title: Movie: Switched for Christmas
programme.desc: Identical twin sisters decide to swap lives for the holidays, learning valuable lessons along the way.

programme.title: Movie: A Crown for Christmas
programme.desc: After getting fired from her job at a ritzy NYC hotel, a woman accepts a job as a governess to a young girl. She finds herself attracted to the girl’s father, who is king of the country, and love reigns over the kingdom.

programme.title: Movie: The Nine Lives of Christmas
programme.desc: A handsome bachelor sees his life change before his eyes when he adopts a stray cat.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The antics of pre-pubescent school children Kyle, Cartman, Kenny and Stan, as they stumble through the deranged misadventures of their hometown, South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Gluten Free Ebola
programme.desc: South Park goes gluten free.

programme.title: South Park: Crème Fraiche
programme.desc: Stan's life is a shambles both at home and in school. Randy's obsession with the Food Network Is changing everything. It even forces Sharon to explore a new interest of her own.

programme.title: South Park: Medicinal Fried Chicken
programme.desc: Cartman's favourite restaurant has been shut down and replaced by a store that sells medicinal marijuana. Randy is desperate to get a prescription card to buy pot and Cartman will do anything to get his beloved fried chicken back.

programme.title: South Park: Let Them Eat Goo
programme.desc: Cartman is sure the new plant-based diet in the school cafeteria gave him a heart attack.

programme.title: South Park: Starvin' Marvin
programme.desc: The boys sign up to sponsor an Ethiopian child to get a fancy new sport watch, but the organization accidentally sends the child instead. When government authorities show up, they mistake Cartman for a starving African child and ship him to Ethiopia.

programme.title: South Park: Cherokee Hair Tampons
programme.desc: Kyle is on his deathbed with a rare kidney disease. Cartman is found to be the perfect donor, but withholds his kidney until Kyle can pay him 10 million dollars.

programme.title: South Park: Red Man's Greed
programme.desc: The citizens of South Park are being forced off their land to make way for a new super highway after owners of the Three Feathers Indian Casino acquire the town.

programme.title: South Park: A History Channel Thanksgiving
programme.desc: The boys are getting close to discovering the truth about the first Thanksgiving.

programme.title: South Park: Helen Keller! The Musical
programme.desc: When Butters informs the fourth graders that the kindergarteners school play is a magnificent sight to behold, they go through a lot of pain to make sure they beat the tiny tots' show. Timmy also finds a new best friend named Gobbles.

programme.title: South Park: Board Girls
programme.desc: The annual Strong Woman competition pushes everyone to their limits.

programme.title: South Park: Turd Burglars
programme.desc: Kyle’s mom has a fecal transplant and the boys are on a quest for the best microbiome.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Wanda Sykes, Nick Kroll and Tracy Morgan
programme.desc: Actual crank calls become the basis for a twisted town inhabited solely by puppets.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: November 19, 2019
programme.desc: Actor and composer Lin-Manuel Miranda visits.

programme.title: Lights Out With David Spade: Jeff Ross, Brad Williams and Annie Lederman
programme.desc: Panelists Jeff Ross, Brad Williams and Annie Lederman join David Spade to talk about the latest in pop culture.

programme.title: South Park: Turd Burglars
programme.desc: Kyle’s mom has a fecal transplant and the boys are on a quest for the best microbiome.

programme.title: South Park: Fun With Veal
programme.desc: Stan is appalled when he realizes the veal he's been eating is, in fact, the meat from little baby calves. He goes to great lengths to rescue calves from the slaughterhouse, and a standoff with the Park County Police Department ensues.

programme.title: South Park: Towelie
programme.desc: When the government steals their new Gamesphere, the boys will stop at nothing to get it back. There is also a new dysfunctional character in South Park who tries to recruit the boys to his cause.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Goes Nanners
programme.desc: Chef's passionate protest declaring the South Park flag is racist enflames the entire town, including the kids.

programme.title: South Park: A Million Little Fibers
programme.desc: Towelie writes a book about his experiences getting over a drug addiction. With Oprah's help, the book becomes a best seller and his story inspires millions to turn their lives around, until the dame of daytime television catches Towelie in a lie.

programme.title: South Park: Freak Strike
programme.desc: When the boys learn that talk shows offer prizes to people who are grossly disfigured they can't sign Butters up fast enough.

programme.title: South Park: Quest for Ratings
programme.desc: The boys of South Park produce their own morning news show on the school's closed-circuit television station and are immediately caught up in an intense competition for ratings.

programme.desc: Birchum recruits strong men to do his chores; features Wanda Sykes and Sarah Silverman.
