programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Wojcik Family
programme.desc: Meet this season’s newest Military Makeover family. The Wojcik's, of Strum, Wisconsin.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas on the Bayou
programme.desc: A workaholic decides to spend Christmas in her home town on the bayou. When a childhood romance is rekindled she is torn between the city and her Southern roots. Only a Christmas miracle can steer her heart to her true home.

programme.title: Movie: Last Chance for Christmas
programme.desc: When Prancer injures his hoof, Santa's stable hand must find a fill in to save Christmas. His mission gets complicated when he discovers that Frankie, the perfect substitute reindeer, belongs to an 8-year-old girl and her mother Annie.

programme.title: Movie: Hometown Christmas
programme.desc: A woman plans to save her town's nativity tradition when she returns to her small home town.

programme.title: Movie: The Flight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Stephanie is crushed when her boyfriend breaks up with her just before the holiday season. Heartbroken and homeless she decides to fly home, but the red eye flight on Christmas Eve is diverted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mom of Three Vanished
programme.desc: Beautiful mom Michelle Parker appears on an episode of' The People’s Court', fighting with her ex-fiancé over a luxury, diamond engagement ring. But hours after that episode airs, Michelle mysteriously vanishes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her home while her husband is on a sailing trip. When investigating, police uncover a lifestyle of sex parties and wife swapping.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Charged Up
programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her home while her husband is on a sailing trip. When investigating, police uncover a lifestyle of sex parties and wife swapping.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Buffalo Trail
programme.desc: The wolf pack seizes an opportunity to stockpile meat with their first ever buffalo hunt. Brothers Noah and Bam are left to build a mine-cooled meat locker and keep the ranch running in anticipation of the family's return.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Beware the Bear-Crow
programme.desc: As bold new predators encroach increasingly closer to the family's ranch, the Browns devise inventive solutions to defend their livestock. Gabe's long-distance girlfriend makes her first, long-anticipated visit to the mountain.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Mountain Emergency
programme.desc: A medical emergency on the Wolfpack's ranch forces the family to become more resourceful as they continue to build their dream on the mountain. Gabe's hasty leap toward marriage has the family concerned.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Winter Is Here
programme.desc: As the first snow falls, the Brown Family makes a risky attempt to move their temporary shelters closer to the barn in hopes of bringing father Billy back home. Noah uses his ingenuity to prepare he and his pregnant wife Rhain Alisha for her first winter.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Growing Pains
programme.desc: The Wolfpack has risked everything to transform the raw wilderness into a working ranch. As they expand faster than they expected, the family is forced to evolve in ways they never imagined.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Let The Feast Begin
programme.desc: The family races to build their homes before winter. Gabe constructs an apartment for him and Raquell in the family barn. The Wolfpack's pheasant hunt turns into a competition in anticipation of a much-needed, post-Thanksgiving celebration.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Survival Is No Game
programme.desc: The Browns have found the perfect place to settle in the Alaskan wilderness but a series of emergencies, including a disaster at sea and great difficulties setting up their home site, leave the Wolfpack wondering if they can even survive.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Growing Pains
programme.desc: The Wolfpack has risked everything to transform the raw wilderness into a working ranch. As they expand faster than they expected, the family is forced to evolve in ways they never imagined.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Turkey With a Side of Hay
programme.desc: In the midst of Thanksgiving preparations, a baby seal needs help getting back to its family in time for dinner. Later, Eivin and August engineer a hay baler that will literally take a load off their backs.

programme.title: Fear Island: Fortress of The Bears
programme.desc: A team ventures deep into the Alaskan wilderness in search of a bear believed to be the largest to ever roam the earth. But as they track it deeper into its deadly domain they discover that their greatest challenge will be surviving the expedition.

programme.title: Serengeti: Destiny
programme.desc: With food in abundance it's the time of plenty in the Serengeti, but a series of unexpected events turns families against each other and stretches relationships to breaking point.

programme.title: Serengeti: Conflict
programme.desc: As the Serengeti starts to dry out, competition heats up between the families we met in Episode One. The strong females take center stage, dealing with headstrong males and fighting for the survival of their kin.

programme.title: Serengeti: Invasion
programme.desc: The anticipation of the annual Great Migration is being felt by all of the Serengeti's families as they wait with great desperation for it to arrive. The land continues to get hotter and hunger starts to bite as food becomes even more scarce.

programme.title: Serengeti: Misfortune
programme.desc: The long-awaited arrival of the Great Migration brings opportunities and food in abundance, but it also increases conflict as every one of the Serengeti's families is put to the test.

programme.title: Serengeti: Exodus
programme.desc: The dry season turns the waterhole into a death trap for herds. But for some, this is a gift.

programme.title: Serengeti: Rebirth
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the fire, tensions are high and family members are still missing. Torrential rain brings new life, turning the scorched earth into a green paradise.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Blackbeard's Hidden Gold
programme.desc: Josh dives for the lost treasure of the legendary pirate Blackbeard.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Columbus: Legend or Liar?
programme.desc: Josh travels worldwide to uncover the myths behind Christopher Columbus.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Fashion Police
programme.desc: Norah comes to her appointment with her opinionated Jordanian family.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: NFL Brides
programme.desc: Devon has come with her fiancé, Duane Brown, and Taya is engaged to Adam Koets.

programme.title: American Dad!: Adventures in Hayleysitting

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Your Dismissive Attitude Toward Boobs
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan get into a power struggle when Alan allows Berta to stay at Charlie's house for a few days while her brother tries to wean himself off drugs at her place. Berta, who has an ulterior motive, plays one brother against the other.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: In Conclusion, Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Beverly insists the entire family gather for the holiday, but tension builds when brother-in-law Marvin tricks Pop-Pop into thinking Thanksgiving was at his house. Meanwhile, Pops passes the torch to Barry and Erica to give the holiday toast.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Pilot

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Supertramp
programme.desc: When Christine learns that Richard and new Christine are enjoying an intimate relationship, she becomes determined to make her own conquests. After several failed attempts to meet eligible men, she finally runs into a guy named Stan at the grocery store.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Open Water
programme.desc: When Christine learns that her close friends, Barb and Pete, are responsible for introducing Richard to his new girlfriend named Christine, she allows them to set her up on a blind date of her own. Meanwhile, Matthew takes Ritchie to swimming lessons.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Dracula Monkey of Borneo
programme.desc: Forrest returns to the volcanic islands of Indonesia to find the Millers Grizzled Langur, otherwise known as the Dracula monkey. When locals inform him of an illegal pet market, his search quickly evolves into a rescue mission.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Legendary Cape Lion
programme.desc: Forrest ventures home to Zimbabwe in search of the mysterious Cape Lion, a massive black-maned predator. He and the crew navigate the African bush determined to get DNA proof, facing threats of charging rhinos and huge prides of lions.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Caribbean Monk Seal
programme.desc: Forrest sets off on a dangerous, shark-infested search for the extinct Caribbean monk seal. To prove its existence, he and the crew descend into deep waters where they come face-to-face with a giant tiger shark.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Madagascar Dwarf Hippo
programme.desc: Known for being a pint-size version of its African cousin, the Malagasy dwarf hippo has been written off as extinct for 1000 years. Forrest and a local biologist to trek through the bush of Madagascar to prove it still survives.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Recovered Evidence: Formosan Clouded Leopard
programme.desc: Featuring all-new footage from Forrest's expeditions. Declared extinct recently, Forrest is tracking clues of the Formosan Clouded Leopard. He treks deep into the jungles of Taiwan where a run-in with a predator might just solve a mystery.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Hidden Turtle of Vietnam
programme.desc: In Vietnam, Forrest teams up with a conservation group to save the largest turtle species in the world from extinction. Using cutting edge technology, they attempt to find a suitor for the last and only surviving giant softshell.

programme.title: Man-Eating Super Croc
programme.desc: A team of brave hunters capture a man-eating crocodile that has been terrorizing a town in the Philippines. They start to wonder if there is another croc that is even bigger than the one they caught.

programme.title: Devoured: Man-Eating Super Snake
programme.desc: An alien species is out of control in America - the Burmese python. Breeding more and more, swallowing bigger and bigger prey, they're proving even humans are fair game.

programme.title: Tanked!: The Miami Heat is On!

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Secret History of Doomsday

programme.desc: Identical twins Wasel and Wael Ali were obsessed with power from an early age. Using false identities they torment unsuspecting people until they become victims of their own game. These twins share more than DNA, they share the same deadly fate.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Green Eyed Monsters
programme.desc: As children, Darlene and Charlene Shuler lived modest lives in South Carolina. But as adults, they lived very lavishly. Insatiable greed and deceit between the sisters ran rampant. Eventually, their bond would be shattered by a single gunshot.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Twin vs. Twin
programme.desc: Identical twins Ron and Tron find solace with one another in their big family. Even though they have physical limitations due to medical issues, both are able to live fruitful lives. Ron is even able to find a blossoming love that soon turns deadly.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Not My Mom
programme.desc: Kimberly Mangrum always lived life in the fast lane, but when she becomes a stepmother, this biker chick becomes hell on wheels. She tightens her grip on the family, but no one is prepared for the path of murder and destruction she will leave in her dust.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Newlydead
programme.desc: Sharon Nelson wanted it all: love, sex and money. When she sets her sights on a handsome doctor, it doesn't matter that he's married with children. Soon, she carves a devastating path filled with broken hearts, broken dreams and dead bodies.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Bloody Betrayal
programme.desc: Growing up with a disfigured face, Patti Donahue feels like the butt of every joke. As an adult, Patti vows to get the last laugh. And when she marries an innocent father of three, she turns their lives into a world of deception, abuse and murder.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Caught in Her Crosshairs
programme.desc: After a string of failed relationships, Veronica thinks single dad, Russ, is the answer to her prayers. As long as his daughter, Kimberly, doesn't get in the way. As their family grows, so does this stepmother's rage and everyone is in her crosshairs.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Breaking Point
programme.desc: In Kerrville, Texas, a long-simmering family feud takes a deadly turn when suspicions and tempers take over. It's a decades-long drama with a shocking ending that nobody sees coming.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: My Sister's Keeper
programme.desc: When 16-year-old Stephanie Santerre goes missing, everyone in her life falls under scrutiny. An emerging web of lies and deception leaves investigators to puzzle out the sordid truth.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Naked Truth
programme.desc: A cold-blooded murder in a devout prayer group triggers a bizarre investigation in Oregon. As police uncover the unlikely culprits pulling the strings, chilling beliefs are brought to light.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Hard Target
programme.desc: FutureWeapons tests inflatable armour, the revolutionary shoulder fired grenades that double the range of weapons, the latest generation of the A10 Thunderbolt ground attack planes and the assault rifle round that stays supersonic out to 1200 yards.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Hitler's Zombie Army
programme.desc: Truth is revealed of the Allied 'monument men' discovery in 1945 of rotting corpses of Germanic heroes. A world of magic, high priests and secret castles is exposed.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex

programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT a Handsome Face
programme.desc: Steven Ray Milam is addicted to robbing banks. After a string of heists, he's dubbed the Handsome Guy Bandit, thanks to a clever disguise. But his pride and a costly mistake put the FBI on his trail. He's forced to leave his family and go on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob a Pawn Shop
programme.desc: Stolen weapons dealer, Conan Helsley, robs a pawnshop with his girlfriend and older brother. Cops eventually hunt them down and put the trio behind bars, but Conan manages to escape!

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to be the Black Market Maestro
programme.desc: A 19-year-old's escalating crimes get him arrested. After a jury acquits him for attempted murder, he reverts back to his old ways by robbing wealthy homeowners. The crime-spree launches a countywide manhunt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape with a Battleaxe
programme.desc: Russell Kerr is serving a 60 year sentence for a crime he says he didn't commit. He and a fellow inmate, Christopher Stout, mastermind an elaborate escape. After busting through the prison gates, they risk life and limb for their one shot of freedom.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Home to Mother
programme.desc: After getting handed a stiff sentence for robbery, Robert Nielsen flees the brutality of prison by escaping and living under the radar with his family in California. But even they can't shield the young fugitive from the challenges of being on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got No Fingerprints
programme.desc: Jerry Bowen fled before sentencing of the murder of Brenda Breckenridge. Bowen erased his fingerprints with acid and befriended homeless men to assume their identities. After 7 yrs, detectives were able to find enough remaining prints to declare a match.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Out of Debt
programme.desc: After suffering a serious injury, Jaime Jones helplessly watches his bills and late notices on mortgage payments pile up. With his family's welfare at stake, he dons a disguise and robs banks to pay off his debts. But his greed will be his downfall.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Pretend to Be a Cop
programme.desc: Peter Gibbs is a career criminal who is constantly lured to the dark side after every prison release, despite vowing to go straight. After a string of robberies catches up to him, he faces decades behind bars but refuses to go down without a fight.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Watch Those Country Girls
programme.desc: Ex-con Roger Delucenay is locked up in county jail. When his brother is sent there a few months later, the two carry out a daring escape. They run to Kentucky to lay low but when a jealous ex rats them out, the two are forced to run again to stay free.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape in Underwear
programme.desc: Ricky McCurry has been in and out of prison his whole life, escaping by tricking and bribing guards. On the outside, McCurry runs into bad luck with botched robberies and high-speed chases.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Hole Budget

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Mother Knows Best
programme.desc: When Bobby told his mother that the real estate market in Portland was perfect for flipping a house, he did not expect her to quit her job and move in with him to find her own project. Now Bobby has to help his inexperienced mother flip her first house.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Never Flip With Family
programme.desc: Aspiring professional house flipper Kay convinces her younger cousin Arniece to help her flip a three-story townhouse in Philadelphia. Arniece soon learns that Kay has no idea how to flip a house.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Not So Silent Partner
programme.desc: Chad and April finally saved up enough money to quit their jobs and start flipping houses with the help of their silent partner Michelle. But when Michelle shows up unannounced to throw in her two cents, April and Chad are the ones left speechless.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: No Use Crying Over Spilt Paint
programme.desc: Marissa and Johan, an Orlando-based husband and wife duo, have decided to flip their first house. But the deeper they get into their renovations, the more they realize they might not be able to pull off this flip.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Reckless Renovations
programme.desc: Mike, an experienced builder, and Tom, a real estate agent, are long-time friends who have decided to flip a two-family home together. Tom's recklessness on the construction site might be the thing that sabotages this flip.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Shiplap and Mishaps
programme.desc: Husband-and-wife flipping team Robert and Tobi have decided to renovate a historic home in New Jersey.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Healthy Holmes
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son renovate his home so he and his girlfriend can start a family.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: Mike meets a woman who needs help tackling projects that have accumulated since her husband passed 10 years ago. At The Half Done House, Sherry teaches the apprentices as they frame out the living room's focal point: a show-stopping fireplace.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Investment Gate
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps a couple pick up the pieces after getting conned out of $300,000 by a contractor friend who has conned millions from other families.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Building Hope

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mud Men
programme.desc: Matteo Lundgren is taking the art of natural building to a whole new level with his custom-designed Cob houses that blend with the environment surrounding them.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Man Cave
programme.desc: Joe Donovan, an avid skier and adventurer, has found the perfect spot for his permanent base camp on a remote ridge in southwest Montana. Follow the adventure as he battles the elements to build his rustic, straw bale, dream cabin.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: A creative mountain biking group from Carbondale, Colorado builds a unique mountain retreat that doubles as their very own bike park feature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Paradise
programme.desc: A realtor and his three children set out to build their dream home together on a wooded ridge top in the Ozark Mountains of Oklahoma.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Mountain House
programme.desc: A creative family builds a custom home where the mountains and desert collide in Colorado's last frontier. The dream project quickly turns into a job when the harsh terrain combines with the demanding pace they've set for themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: A couple plans to build an oceanfront oasis for their family on the slopes of Maui, Hawaii. To keep the budget low, they design a Quonset hut which can be built cheaply and quickly, but unexpected setbacks test their limits at every turn.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage
programme.desc: Outlaw architect Michael Reynolds doesn't just live off the grid, he builds off the grid.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A New World of Challenges
programme.desc: Three news teams begin their projects and rookie builders Matt and Amy Hill quickly realize building in snow is more complicated than they planned. Mike and Dan Owens mill their own lumber while Jackie hires professionals to dig her foundation.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Killer Eats In Kc
programme.desc: Ali Khan is in Kansas City, Mo., looking for the best deals on breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. He kicks things off with an innovative breakfast flatbread topped with gravy, scrambled eggs and cheddar.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Noshin' In Nawlins
programme.desc: Ali Khan finds the best meal deals in New Orleans.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Rockin' Deals in Memphis
programme.desc: Ali Khan is tracking down the best deals in Memphis for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. He powers up for the day with a protein waffle loaded with house-smoked pork, sausage and caramelized onions.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Mealin' and Dealin' In Michigan
programme.desc: Ali Khan is hunting down the best deals in Ann Arbor, Michigan.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Juicy, Crunchy and Tangy
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Lexington, Ky. for a plump pork burger and ingenious smoked chicken wings smothered in a blackberry jalapeno sauce.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot and Spicy
programme.desc: Michael Symon digs into a spicy burger that uses four different types of peppers to fire up even the most adventurous eaters in Hell's Kitchen, New York City, before heading to Nashville, where he finds Southern comforts infused with Latin flavors.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Salty and Smoky in the Windy City
programme.desc: Anthony Anderson hooks up with Michael Symon to discover some of the city's legendary food institutions for sensational smoke sausages and indulgent burgers.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sausages, Franks and Dogs
programme.desc: In Sagaponack, N.Y., Michael Symon heads to a smokehouse where succulent, slow-smoked pork ribs are mopped with a tangy, citrus barbecue sauce. In Columbus, Ohio, there's a beefy burger topped with smoky kielbasa.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Fish and Fowl
programme.desc: In North Bend, Ore., Chef Roger Mooking meets up with Don Ivy, Chief of the Coquille Tribe. Roger and Don roast a school of salmon for a traditional tribal feast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Queens of 'Cue
programme.desc: Roger meets with two Southern ladies famous in the barbecue world. In Nashville, Roger has eyes only for the smoked ribs at Mary's Old Fashioned Pit Bar-B-Que.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Cajun Cuisine
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 15 of America's best Cajun dishes, from classics like crawfish, jambalaya and gumbo to a few surprises.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of the Dominican Republic, a meat-lover's paradise. From whole roast pig and crispy, Lebanese-inspired fried dough pockets to beef and plantain casseroles, Dominican gastronomy is full of surprises.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, upscale crab bisque and down-home barbecue stew so thick it'll make your spoon stand up.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quito
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the diverse culinary classics of Ecuador's capital city, Quito. The urban cuisine satisfies stomachs with fried pork and potato cakes, fresh ceviche, sugar-coated roasted peanuts, fish soup and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Town
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern leaves no meal unexplored in multicultural Cape Town, South Africa, where meat comes in all forms, from sausage to stew to pie. The coastal city's seafood is out of this world, and the favorite pastry is nothing without a coat of syrup!

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Jive Turkey

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Get Out My Grill

programme.desc: Rev teaches his daughter a special recipe from his childhood: his mother's savory Shrimp and Rice. To complete the meal, Justine serves up a side of her Cheddar and Chive Biscuits and a Chocolate Fondue dessert that would have made Momma Evelyn proud.

programme.title: Rev Run's Thanksgiving Supper

programme.title: Unique Eats: Italian

programme.title: Movie: The Chronicles of Narnia: Prince Caspian
programme.desc: Four children help fight to restore a kingdom to its rightful heir.

programme.title: The Will Cain Show
programme.desc: Will Cain gives you his unfiltered take on the biggest stories in the sports world.

programme.title: The American Game: College vs. Pro
programme.desc: As football professionalized, the college game was deeply impacted and forever changed. The two sports are closely connected, and the conflict between amateur and pro will always undeniably shadow the college game.

programme.title: The Greatest: College-to-Pro Coaches
programme.desc: The best coaches can lift their programs to great heights, but not every great college coach can also succeed in the pros. These are the top 11 of all time who've succeeded in both the college and pro ranks.

programme.title: The Greatest: What-Ifs?
programme.desc: Part of the fun is wondering what might have happened if a call went one way instead of another, or a key figure made a different decision or the rules were just a little different. These are the top 11 hypotheticals of all time.

programme.title: The American Game: Bowls, Polls and Champions
programme.desc: For generations, America was at least somewhat content to agree to often vehemently disagree. Controversies arose from the polls to computers to the creation of the BCS. At last, the College Football Playoff has offered a more decisive solution.

programme.title: The American Game: Games of the Century
programme.desc: The greatest games in college football history – the so-called games of the century – are remembered forever as contests where stars were born, legends were made and sport's chronicle was indelibly transformed.

programme.title: The Greatest: Upsets
programme.desc: College football has always been a game of Davids and Goliaths. Some of the most indelible results have been the ones that were least expected. These are the top 11 upsets, and the stories behind them.

programme.title: The Greatest: Rivalry Games
programme.desc: Every season, college football rivals face off, and the intensity and passion are at a fever pitch. Some clashes have resulted in unforgettable games. These are the top 11 of those quintessential, classic gridiron battles.

programme.title: The American Game: Rivalries
programme.desc: If passion lies at the heart at college football, then rivalries are what fuel the passion in dramatic, intense and entertaining ways. In this sport, the more you want to beat your enemy, the more exciting that makes the matchup.

programme.title: The American Game: Notre Dame
programme.desc: The story of college football can't be told without the story of its most legendary program - its rise to lore, its glories and triumphs, its superstars and icons, its controversies and contradictions.

programme.title: The Greatest: Uniforms
programme.desc: In college football, uniforms are at the core of a team's identity and its pride. These are the top 11 colors, combinations, and flourishes of all time on uniforms, helmets, and more, all across the country.

programme.title: The Greatest: Voices
programme.desc: As college football has played out, the voices who've told the stories have become an indelible part of the tale themselves. These are the top 11 of those voices – at the typewriter, at the microphone and in front of the camera.

programme.title: The American Game
programme.desc: College football has evolved in so many transformative ways. All throughout its history, the sport's constant evolutions have had common threads, with officials and coaches striving to make it safer, more exciting and more entertaining.

programme.title: The Season: Ole Miss Football: Fall Camp
programme.desc: The Rebels head back to Oxford for fall camp and newcomer John Rhys Plumlee learns navigating the campus can cause quite the challenge. Mac Brown not only meets the media but makes his reporter debut. Plus, a look inside the huddle.

programme.title: The Season: Ole Miss Football: Memphis
programme.desc: Go inside the meeting room with the NWO, follow along with one of the newest rebels as he heads to class for the first time and go behind the scenes of a Rich Rodriguez practice.

programme.title: The Season: Ole Miss Football
programme.desc: Meet the new leaders behind the Rebels' offensive and defensive fronts, go to practice with Jaylon Jones and relive all the moments from an SEC opening win over Arkansas.

programme.title: The Season: Ole Miss Football
programme.desc: Go inside Derrick Nix's meeting room, learn the ropes in the trenches from Alex Givens and relive the win over Southeastern Louisiana in the Vaught.

programme.title: The Season: Ole Miss Football
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes with linebackers coach Jeff Koonz, cook in the kitchen with Donta Evans and watch fan favorite Senquez Golson get inducted to the Ole Miss M-Club Hall of Fame.

programme.title: The Season: Ole Miss Football
programme.desc: Go inside Coach Tyrone Nix's meeting room, hear from Jacquez Jones as he heads back to his hometown and watch the young Rebels show their grit in a tough road environment.

programme.title: The Season: Ole Miss Football
programme.desc: Patrick Willis comes back to Oxford. Hear from Jerrion Ealy in practice and cap off homecoming in style.

programme.title: The Season: Ole Miss Football
programme.desc: Find out what it means to be 'Mississippi Made,' go inside the classroom with Derrick Nix and watch the Rebels battle it out with the top team from the SEC East.

programme.title: The Season: Ole Miss Football
programme.desc: Follow Jaylon Jones' journey back from injury, Myles Hartsfield heads to a local elementary school to read to kids and hear from Ben Brown at practice.

programme.title: The Season: Ole Miss Football
programme.desc: John Rhys Plumlee heads to Reb Talk for the first time. Plus, go inside Coach Koonz's meeting room and watch the Rebels battle until the end with a ranked team on the road.

programme.title: The Season: Ole Miss Football
programme.desc: Follow Austrian Robinson's path to the Chucky Mullins award, visit the Special Olympics Ole Miss Championships with MoMo Sanogo and Donta Evans and the Rebels wrap up with a dominating win back at the Vaught.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part One: 1869-1932
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Civil War, America's south is looking to put the past behind it, and finds one path in a growing cultural passion of the north: football. In December 1932, the Southeastern Conference is officially formed.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Two: 1933-1959
programme.desc: Multiple SEC schools claim national titles from the 1930s through the 1950s. In 1958, LSU won with star running back Billy Cannon leading the way, and a year later Cannon had epic game-winning punt return against powerhouse Ole Miss.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Three: 1960-1970
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Georgia Tech leaves the conference and the civil rights movement becomes embedded in the history and image of the region. Bear Bryant, hired in 1958, becomes the face of Alabama, and of SEC football.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Four: 1969-1979
programme.desc: As a new decade dawns, quarterbacks Archie Manning, Bert Jones and Condredge Holloway build memorable legacies. Bear Bryant begins a new run of dominance at Alabama, and the rise of television sports transforms the SEC.

programme.title: Speak for Yourself With Whitlock and Wiley

programme.title: Lock It In
programme.desc: Host Rachel Bonnetta joined by Clay Travis, Todd Fuhrman, and 'Cousin Sal' Locono present a one-of-a-kind daily sports show featuring the world of sports gambling. See what the experts are saying and who they are putting their hypothetical money on.

programme.title: Movie: Us
programme.desc: Evil doppelgangers terrorize a vacationing family.

programme.desc: Comedian Julio Torres examines his favorite shapes, which include a plexiglass square, an oval he wishes were a circle, a self-conscious cactus, and a Ferrero Rocher chocolate.

programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: Isn't It Romantic
programme.desc: After woman who has spent her whole life feeling cynical about love and romance suffers a nasty hit to the head, she wakes up to find herself living in a romantic comedy, complete with new friends and a new love interest vying for her attention.

programme.title: Movie: Big
programme.desc: A boy awakens as a full-grown man but is not ready to face the adult world.

programme.title: Movie: Little
programme.desc: A woman with a high-pressure career is transformed into a younger version of herself.

programme.title: Movie: Bohemian Rhapsody
programme.desc: Singer and songwriter Freddie Mercury helps form the band Queen, but at the same time that his flamboyant stage presence and powerful vocals lead the group to new levels of stardom his tumultuous personal life begins to spiral out of control.

programme.title: Movie: The Conjuring 2
programme.desc: Lorraine and Ed Warren are asked to go to North London to help a single mother of four deal with the supernatural entities in her house. Lorraine discovers that the family is merely a pawn in a deadly battle, and she fights to save their souls.

programme.title: Room 104
programme.desc: Room 104 tells a different story about the characters who stay in this hotel room.

programme.title: His Dark Materials: Armour
programme.desc: Lyra and the Gyptians arrive in the North, and seek the help of the Witches' Consul, Texan aeronaut Lee Scoresby and an armored bear in service to the town.

programme.desc: A popular courtesan working at the Moulin Rouge falls in love with a poet in 1899 Paris.

programme.title: Lindsey Vonn: The Final Season
programme.desc: This documentary chronicles Lindsey Vonn competing in her final World Championship as well as depicting her rise from child prodigy to a four-time Olympic gold medalist.

programme.title: Real Sports With Bryant Gumbel
programme.desc: Goes beyond the scores and statistics to present a critical look at the world of sports.

programme.title: Silicon Valley
programme.desc: A comic look at the modern-day epicenter of the high-tech gold rush.

programme.title: Movie: The Nun
programme.desc: A priest with a past that haunts him and a novitiate on the brink of her final vows travel to a remote Romanian abbey on orders from the Vatican to investigate a nun's death, risking their lives and their souls when they encounter an evil force.

programme.title: Movie: The Favourite
programme.desc: Queen Anne of Great Britain is a woman of ill health, and her close friend Lady Sarah handles the day-to-day work of governing, but when Sarah's cousin arrives at court it sparks a bitter rivalry between them over who is the Queen's favourite.

programme.title: Watchmen: This Extraordinary Being
programme.desc: Conflicted, damaged superheroes navigate a dystopian future.

programme.title: Movie: Rescue Dawn
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Dieter Dengler. An American fighter pilot leads a group of POWs in a courageous escape from a Vietnamese POW camp.

programme.title: Movie: Sky Captain and the World of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Sky Captain and his journalist ex-flame must try to stop a series of robot attacks plaguing New York. His struggle brings him from Nepal to Shangri-La, ending on a mysterious German scientist's island lair where he learns the surprising truth.

programme.title: Movie: Robin Hood
programme.desc: When his king is killed in battle, Robin, a lowly archer, promises a dying Robin of Locksley that he will return his sword to his father in Nottingham. What Robin and his men find there is more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Movie: Glass
programme.desc: A man with multiple personalities, including one with superhuman strength and a brutal nature, joins forces with a super-genius to reveal to the world that comic book villains are real, but they're opposed by a loving father with incredible strength.

programme.title: Succession: The Summer Palace
programme.desc: Kendall tries to make amends with his dad and Logan receives stark advice from his banker.

programme.title: Succession: Vaulter
programme.desc: Shiv weighs her options between Waystar Royco and Gil’s campaign, while Roman and Kendall disagree on how to proceed with uncooperative new media company Vaulter.

programme.title: Succession: Hunting
programme.desc: Logan's decision to go after a rival news company comes under scrutiny and, at a corporate retreat in Hungary, he tries to sniff out a betrayer among his family and employees.

programme.title: Succession: Safe Room
programme.desc: A Pierce family member comes to the Waystar Royco offices with a message.

programme.title: Movie: Apocalypse Now Redux
programme.desc: A soldier is sent into the jungles of Cambodia to find and kill an insane colonel.

programme.title: Ready for War
programme.desc: An exploration of the hurdles many immigrant soldiers face in the U.S.

programme.title: Movie: Julie and Julia
programme.desc: A frustrated New Yorker named Julie spends a year cooking her way through Julia Child's 'Mastering the Art of French Cooking.' The lives of these two women soon become intertwined as they both discover their passion in their own time.

programme.title: Movie: When Harry Met Sally
programme.desc: A star-crossed, neurotic couple repeatedly drift apart and meet again over a span of 13 years, always teetering on the edge of romance.

programme.title: Movie: Second Act
programme.desc: A talented but uneducated woman stuck in a low-paying job gets a call out of the blue for an interview with a well-paying company. After landing the job, she learns that it's due to a fake Facebook profile set up in her name that makes her look great.

programme.title: Movie: Rust Creek
programme.desc: An overachiever gets lost on her way to a job interview, and a wrong turn leaves her stranded.

programme.title: Inside the NFL: 2019: Week 12
programme.desc: Presents exclusive NFL highlights of every football game from the previous week.

programme.title: Movie: American Assassin
programme.desc: After his fiancée is killed in a terrorist attack, a man is recruited by an elite CIA division. After receiving training from a Cold War veteran, he's sent to stop a rogue agent who has acquired a nuclear weapon and is set on sparking a global conflict.

programme.title: Movie: The Hummingbird Project
programme.desc: A pair of tech trader cousins go toe-to-toe with their old boss during a million dollar fiber-optic cable deal.

programme.title: Movie: Godzilla

programme.title: Movie: The Help
programme.desc: Racial barriers crumble as three women form unlikely friendships in a small American town.

programme.title: Movie: A Time to Kill
programme.desc: A lawyer defends a factory worker accused of killing the men who assaulted his daughter.

programme.title: Movie: The House With a Clock in Its Walls
programme.desc: A 10-year-old orphan sent to live with his uncle learns that magic is real, and that his uncle is a warlock. He begins learning magic, but when he uses it to impress a classmate he accidentally releases a great evil that threatens the entire world.

programme.title: Movie: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: An undercover FBI agent infiltrates the mob and finds himself identifying with the Mafia.

programme.title: Movie: McFarland, USA
programme.desc: A PE teacher takes a job at a predominantly Latino high school in a small California town, and puts together what becomes a championship cross-country team.

programme.title: Movie: A Dog's Way Home
programme.desc: A dog and her human have a very special bond that only they can really understand, but when the two become separated from each other the furry friend sets out on an incredible 400-mile journey to track down and reunite with her beloved human.

programme.title: Movie: Holmes & Watson
programme.desc: Sidekicks and best friends Sherlock Holmes and John Watson race against time when someone is murdered in Buckingham Palace. At the scene of the crime they find a letter from Holmes' nemesis Moriarty, announcing his intention to kill Queen Victoria.

programme.title: Movie: Ice Age: The Meltdown
programme.desc: Manny, Sid and Diego come to realize that the warm weather could spell trouble by melting a large glacial dam surrounding the valley. Along the way, Manny's fears of being the last woolly mammoth are diminished when he meets a female named Ellie.

programme.title: Movie: McFarland, USA
programme.desc: A PE teacher takes a job at a predominantly Latino high school in a small California town, and puts together what becomes a championship cross-country team.

programme.title: Movie: Field of Dreams
programme.desc: After hearing voices, a farmer constructs a mystical baseball diamond in his cornfield. To his surprise, deceased members from the Chicago Black Sox come to the field to play baseball.

programme.title: Movie: Barbershop 2: Back in Business
programme.desc: Adventures and laughs ensue as a stylist at the beauty shop next door tries to cut in on Calvin's business. Calvin also faces more struggles to keep his father's shop afloat as urban developers invade the neighbourhood and try to close his business.

programme.title: Movie: Breach
programme.desc: A young agent is assigned to keep tabs on another FBI agent who's suspected of selling secrets to the Soviets during and after the Cold War.

programme.title: Movie: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: A young woman invites three of her mother's past suitors to her upcoming wedding so she can learn which one may be her father.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a bitter miser named Ebenezer Scrooge is visited by many spirits who show him the errors of his ways and give him the chance to redeem himself.

programme.title: Movie: Holmes & Watson
programme.desc: Sidekicks and best friends Sherlock Holmes and John Watson race against time when someone is murdered in Buckingham Palace. At the scene of the crime they find a letter from Holmes' nemesis Moriarty, announcing his intention to kill Queen Victoria.

programme.title: Movie: Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time

programme.title: Movie: McFarland, USA
programme.desc: A PE teacher takes a job at a predominantly Latino high school in a small California town, and puts together what becomes a championship cross-country team.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Note
programme.desc: A woman moves to a new town with her son. In her building she meets her new neighbor and helps her uncover the truth of a sibling she was not aware of, during the course creates a bond and unites a community just in time for Christmas.

programme.desc: A group of adults from different parts of the country swear off partaking in holiday events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men call police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cracking the D.B. Cooper Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets off on an expedition to crack the mystery behind the perpetrator of the only unsolved plane hijacking in US history.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Plummer's Gold
programme.desc: Josh sets off for gold rush country to search for the lost fortune of a notorious Montana sheriff. During his investigation, Josh explores hidden cave systems and blows open a mine that's been sealed for over a century.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Code to Gold
programme.desc: Josh scours Virginia backcountry in search of the legendary Thomas Beale Treasure, worth millions today. With encrypted codes hiding its whereabouts, Josh takes a detour to Philadelphia to uncover missing pieces to the puzzle.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: America's Lost WWII Hero
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores the case of lost World War II hero Gertrude 'Tommy' Tompkins of the Women Air Force Service Pilots, who went missing when her P-51 Mustang crashed. Josh joins search teams using cutting-edge technology to bring the lost hero home.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Ghost Ship of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: Josh tackles the mystery of The Griffon, the first ship to be lost in the Great Lakes. With a state-of-the-art submarine, Josh dives to find a ship so elusive that it's known as 'The Holy Grail of Shipwrecks'.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: America's Lost Mysteries
programme.desc: Josh Gates dives deep into American mysteries by investigating the Lost Colony of Roanoke, searching for Jesse James' loot and looking out for Butch Cassidy's missing money.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Rise and Fall
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to India in search of a mythical kingdom.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Search for Florida's Lost Pirate
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets sail for Florida chasing the long-lost treasure of bloodthirsty pirate Jose Gaspar. Josh joins marine archaeologists and treasure hunters working to crack the mysteries of the pirate's life so they can find the riches he left behind.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle on the Brink
programme.desc: A year behind bars, Tickle transfers to Culpeper County, and Tim concocts a plan to get him out. Breaking the shiner code can come at a steep price for Mark Rogers. Mark & Digger's handmade vodka is on a hot streak until a cold snap put’s profits at risk.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Breaking the Code
programme.desc: A cold snap threatens Mark and Digger's handmade vodka. For Mark Rogers, breaking the moonshiner code can come at a steep price. And Tim Smith risks a big run of Tickle's double rye to put the woods back into his shine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hillbilly Hack
programme.desc: Mark and Digger build a hillbilly hack to save their handmade vodka. Pam may know more than she thinks about Popcorn's lost shine. Nothing but trouble for Josh running a still outside of the woods. Patti and David risk a seaplane bootleg on the bayou.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Risky Whiskey
programme.desc: Josh and Bill rebuild bigger and better. Lance takes a risk on a new kind of whiskey, while Jeff and Mark prep their indoor still site. Tickle and crew battle the elements in Kentucky. Tim gives the North Carolina distillery a backwoods makeover.

programme.title: Moonshiners: The Trouble with Tickle
programme.desc: Tickle returns to Tim's legal distillery and discovers he's traded one prison for another. Mark and Digger unearth a trove of Popcorn's shine. Josh finds an untapped market at a biker rally, only to learn the cost of entry is more than the ticket price.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle Runs Again
programme.desc: Moonshine's prodigal son, Tickle, returns from a year in jail to the Appalachian backwoods. With long-time partner, Tim, determined to stay legal, Tickle recruits an old friend to make an inaugural run of shine and re-stake his claim as an outlaw shiner.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle in a Pickle
programme.desc: With shine selling at $200 a gallon, Tickle returns to the woods with two notorious outlaw shiners. Mark and Digger rediscover Popcorn Sutton's mystery multi-grain shine, and Mike dumps his partner and hires a new hand to construct a hidden still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Corn-fed Conundrum
programme.desc: Mark and Digger contend with an unruly herd of cattle standing between them and their new still site. Tickle pulls Tim back to the woods to rediscover his roots on the outlaw side. Mike and Jerry devise a plan to access a perfectly hidden still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Proof is in the Payoff
programme.desc: Tim and Tickle return to the scene of past crimes and rediscover their passion for outlaw moonshining. Mark Rogers designs a custom pot still to double distill shine he can sell for twice the price. Mark and Digger hand-build a copper mailbox still.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Two Teams, One Dream
programme.desc: Fred and Dustin Hurt decide to split up in their hunt for gold in the raging waters of Alaska's Chilkat mountains. While Fred has an ideal spot picked out, Dustin has a big decision to make about his location.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: The Pound Zone
programme.desc: Dustin's crew finds an ideal claim to mine, but to get down to the gold they have to make it through the waterfall's pound zone. Fred brings in a new miner, only to have his path to bedrock gold is blocked by massive boulders.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: No Guts, No Glory Holes
programme.desc: Fred and his crew return to the glory hole to complete unfinished business. Dustin's crew strikes gold, but are blocked by massive boulders and must engineer an insane system of winches and pulleys to go deeper and get down to bedrock.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Who Shot Who?
programme.desc: A doctor treats three gunshot victims who claim to be innocent bystanders. Later, a doctor must perform emergency brain surgery in the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Turtle Trouble
programme.desc: A man has a snapping turtle clamped to his neck, and it will not let go. As a hurricane closes in, an ER doctor rushes to get all the patients out. A man is impaled by a chainsaw while trimming trees twenty feet high.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Medieval Mayhem
programme.desc: A man injured in a medieval roleplaying battle has a sword impaled in his head. A critically ill patient is so afraid of germs he won't allow doctors to treat him. Two patients with the same life-threatening symptoms arrive separately from a fashion show.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Don't Push It!
programme.desc: Two patients with gunshot wounds share a shocking connection. A jogger slips into a coma but has no ID and the ER must track down her next of kin.

programme.title: 600 Pound Mom
programme.desc: Dominique is imprisoned within her house because of morbid obesity, leaving her six daughters worried for her life. Dominique will have to shed 112 lbs. to qualify for weight-loss surgery, her only hope.

programme.title: 600 Pound Mom: Race Against Time
programme.desc: Dominique's severe addiction to food prevented her from losing enough pounds to have weight loss surgery. This single mom of six continues to struggle with her diet.

programme.title: The 685-lb Teen
programme.desc: Justin Williamson is a teenager who weighs 670 lbs and is chasing his musical dreams while fighting for his life. Faced with death or surgery, Justin must transform.

programme.title: 900 Pound Man: The Race Against Time
programme.desc: At 900 lbs., Ricky is one of the world's largest men. Follow Ricky over three years as he struggles to find a surgeon willing to take on his case and a way off the island of Guam to get the potentially lifesaving surgery he desperately needs.

programme.title: 600 Pound Mom
programme.desc: Dominique is imprisoned within her house because of morbid obesity, leaving her six daughters worried for her life. Dominique will have to shed 112 lbs. to qualify for weight-loss surgery, her only hope.

programme.title: 600 Pound Mom: Race Against Time
programme.desc: Dominique's severe addiction to food prevented her from losing enough pounds to have weight loss surgery. This single mom of six continues to struggle with her diet.

programme.title: The 685-lb Teen
programme.desc: Justin Williamson is a teenager who weighs 670 lbs and is chasing his musical dreams while fighting for his life. Faced with death or surgery, Justin must transform.

programme.title: 900 Pound Man: The Race Against Time
programme.desc: At 900 lbs., Ricky is one of the world's largest men. Follow Ricky over three years as he struggles to find a surgeon willing to take on his case and a way off the island of Guam to get the potentially lifesaving surgery he desperately needs.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Julie Bowen
programme.desc: Julie Bowen makes a shocking discovery that a beloved relative lead a nefarious organization that triggered a dark chapter of U.S. history; and uncovers another ancestor who risked everything to fight for the lives and freedom of African Americans.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: John Stamos
programme.desc: Actor John Stamos explores his Greek heritage for the first time and discovers an explosive feud that shattered his grandfather's childhood. He also meets a relative he never knew and hears firsthand about his family's enduring strength.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Meet the Plaths
programme.desc: The nine flaxen-haired children in the Plath family have never had a soda, don't know who Spiderman or Tom Brady is and have never watched TV, living remotely in rural Georgia with their 'follow their own rules' parents Kim and Barry Plath.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Starving for Independence
programme.desc: In order to avoid more tension in the family, Kim allows Moriah to go to San Francisco with Olivia. From the moment they land Moriah quickly realizes she's a long way from south Georgia. Ethan finds creative ways to pass the time while Olivia is gone.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Mom's Gonna Find Out
programme.desc: Barry and Kim leave the farm for a night to celebrate their anniversary, putting Micah and Lydia in charge. They just have one rule: Ethan and Olivia aren't allowed to visit the farm while they're away. The Plath kids party and some uninvited guests join.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: No Strings Attached
programme.desc: After the request for Isaac to join the band is denied by Barry and Kim, the family divide grows. Kim and Barry try to do damage control by extending a large and surprising olive branch to Ethan and Olivia. Moriah shares her desire for college.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: A Lipoma Is Born
programme.desc: Barbara's back lump became more noticeable after she lost 131 pounds. Bob has two painful bumps on his back. Hilda's depression is a result of the multitude of bumps on her eyelids. Art has one big bump on his head that he covers up with hats.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Every Rosacea Has Its Thorn
programme.desc: Patrick's nose is covered by huge bumps and he can barely breathe. Aziza and Lauren are friends who bonded over their matching wrist lumps. Joe has a mound in the middle of his forehead that looks like a third eye.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Last Unicorn
programme.desc: Louis is a veteran who is covered in scaly, dry skin that makes him feel like an alligator. Irais's kids are bullied because of the embarrassing growth on her head. Johnny's been living with a stubborn lump on his back for too long.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Popping Popeye
programme.desc: Lisa has a horn growing out of the back of her head and fears that it could be cancer. Victor has a bulbous lump on the middle of his chest. Chuck has a Popeye-shaped bump on his arm. Christian and Jonathan are teenage brothers with matching lumps.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Scared Cyst-Less
programme.desc: Taylore is a beautiful, young woman with unsightly elf-like bumps on her ears. Jose never goes out because of the baseball-sized lump on his head. Ken is covered in painful bumps that make it difficult to do everyday things.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Runaway Bump, Never Coming Back?
programme.desc: Leonard has an alarming bump hanging off of his arm that looks like it's breaking through the skin. Brandon has several lumps on his head that makes him fearful for his life. Jess got a noticeable lump on her butt after falling down the stairs.

programme.title: Tanked!: Nacho Average Fish Tanks
